title: Urban Planning and Sustainability
description: For questions 17 – 24, read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line.

content.text: The rapid (0) expansion of cities has led to significant environmental challenges. Planners are now looking for ways to (17) the impact of urban sprawl. One approach is the (18) of derelict industrial sites into green spaces. || This (19) of land use not only improves air quality but also fosters a sense of community. Furthermore, the (20) of public transport systems is essential to reduce car dependency. However, some residents express (21) regarding the cost of these projects. They fear that the (22) of certain neighborhoods will lead to higher taxes. Despite these concerns, the (23) of sustainable policies is (24) for the city's long-term health.

questions.explanation: Verb formation with suffix -en meaning to reduce.
Complex noun formation from a verb/adjective.
Noun indicating the process of making something modern.
Noun formed with prefix en- and suffix -ment.
Noun with spelling change (ai to e).
Adjective with negative prefix meaning absolutely necessary.
